programmes.show_name: Long Lost Family: Born Without Trace
programmes.show_description: A man abandoned at a mother and baby care home in Wales - and a woman abandoned in another baby's pram in England - are desperate to know who left them and why.

AJ and Vernon host the second series grand final, as the three remaining designers go head-to-head in their biggest challenge yet.
Snowdonia: James' adventure brings him over the border into north Wales as he is joined by chef Stephen Terry for a leg that includes a stop at Pale Hall.
James is back in the kitchen and cooking up a feast of delicious food for comedian Alan Davies, enjoying a dish from chef Sami Tamimi, and learning all about beans with gardener David Domoney.
Jimmy and Shivi are joined by 'cake maker to the stars' Juliet Sear for chicken sculptures, beekeeping lessons, and a carrot cake masterclass.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world.

programmes.show_name: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programmes.show_description: Joining Alan this time are TV’s biggest Taskmaster Alan Davies, wildlife enthusiast Michaela Strachan, and Call the Midwife stars Annabelle Apsion and Cliff Parisi.
Documentary series. The day has finally arrived for a clear-out and renovation work to begin on the farmhouse, and Milo gets a lesson in the birds and the bees from Kelvin.
Ainsley Harriott celebrates the Bahamas' festival spirit, has a fritto misto masterclass with chef Scott Conant and serves up barbecue jerk-spiced chicken.
A round-up of royal news with expert analysis from ITV News Royal Editor Chris Ship, ITV News royal expert Lizzie Robinson and a host of guests.
Northern Irish Coast: James' British adventure has crossed over the Irish Sea to Northern Ireland, where he's joined by his great pal and famous local chef Paul Rankin.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world.
The search for the most spectacular entertainers to hit these shores continues in Blackpool as more hopefuls are welcomed by award-winning hosts Ant & Dec and face the judges.

programmes.show_name: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programmes.show_description: Oscar-winning adventure sequel starring Harrison Ford. The famed archaeologist is back and this time, he's in pursuit of a priceless, sacred stone.
Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show where it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions are all about logic and common sense.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world as well as the latest major sports results.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
Rob Brydon hosts the grand finale of the game show as the final nine players battle it out for the 50,000-pound jackpot.

programmes.show_name: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programmes.show_description: There's drama, nail-biting tension, and Jeremy Clarkson on hand to give away one million pounds - find out if anyone has got what it takes to head home as a millionaire.
When an impassive headmaster reports that his wife has gone missing to the police, her disappearance soon takes a sinister turn.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world.
A powerful documentary following a five-year hunt for answers and justice by three women who were portrayed as offering sexual services in deepfake profiles online.
This episode features Sue Stalley - a mother searching for the son she was forced to give up as a teenager - and Melanie Mackney, a woman looking for her elder twin sisters.
Teleshopping.
The concluding part of the two-part series. The detectives unravel long-forgotten secrets and have a potential circumstantial case, but they need more to prove their case in court.

Magazine show with news and topical items, celebrity guests, expert advice, real-life stories, competitions and a mix of cookery, health, beauty, lifestyle and more.

The fast-paced game of words hosted by Adil Ray - playing this time are the reigning Lingo champions alongside sisters Jo and Lucy and Nottingham couple Elisha and Joseph.
Ranvir Singh hosts the rapid and ruthless quiz as contestants Taylor and Jake, Sia and Elvis, and Mel and Melanie take on Riddlemaster Henry Lewis in a bid to solve his riddles.

Sarah tells Cain straight, Liam urges Cain to tell Moira, and Moira struggles with the news.
Theo uses his birthday to make Todd pay, Jodie resents Adam for lecturing her, Leanne worries about Sam, and Lauren puts a dampener on Ollie and Amy’s date.
